name: Build / Regression

on:
  push:
    branches: [ "master" ]

  pull_request:
    branches: [ "master" ]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Get latest commit id of PostgreSQL 18
        run: |
          echo "PG_COMMIT_HASH=$(git ls-remote https://git.postgresql.org/git/postgresql.git refs/heads/REL_18_STABLE | awk '{print $1}')" >> $GITHUB_ENV

      - name: Cache PostgreSQL 18
        uses: actions/cache@v3
        id: pg18cache
        with:
          path: ~/pg18
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-v1-pg18-${{ env.PG_COMMIT_HASH }}

      - name: Install necessary dependencies
        run: |
          sudo apt-get update
          sudo apt-get install -y build-essential libreadline-dev zlib1g-dev flex bison

      - name: Install PostgreSQL 18 and some extensions
        if: steps.pg18cache.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
        run: |
          git clone --depth 1 --branch REL_18_STABLE https://git.postgresql.org/git/postgresql.git ~/pg18source
          cd ~/pg18source
          ./configure --prefix=$HOME/pg18 CFLAGS="-std=gnu99 -ggdb -O0" --enable-cassert
          make install -j$(nproc) > /dev/null
          cd contrib
          cd fuzzystrmatch
          make PG_CONFIG=$HOME/pg18/bin/pg_config install -j$(nproc) > /dev/null
          cd ../pg_trgm
          make PG_CONFIG=$HOME/pg18/bin/pg_config install -j$(nproc) > /dev/null

      - uses: actions/checkout@v3

      - name: Build AGE
        id: build
        run: |
          make PG_CONFIG=$HOME/pg18/bin/pg_config install -j$(nproc)

      - name: Pull and build pgvector
        id: pgvector
        run: |
          git clone https://github.com/pgvector/pgvector.git
          cd pgvector
          make PG_CONFIG=$HOME/pg18/bin/pg_config install -j$(nproc) > /dev/null

      - name: Regression tests
        id: regression_tests
        run: |
          make PG_CONFIG=$HOME/pg18/bin/pg_config installcheck EXTRA_TESTS="pgvector fuzzystrmatch pg_trgm"
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Dump regression test errors
        if: steps.regression_tests.outcome != 'success'
        run: |
          echo "Dump section begin."
          cat $HOME/work/age/age/regress/regression.diffs
          echo "Dump section end."
          exit 1

content.thinking:
Perfect! Now I understand what the job does:

1. Gets the latest PostgreSQL 18 commit hash
2. Uses caching for PostgreSQL 18 (if available, skip build)
3. Installs dependencies: build-essential, libreadline-dev, zlib1g-dev, flex, bison
4. Installs PostgreSQL 18 from source if not cached
5. Installs fuzzystrmatch and pg_trgm extensions
6. Checks out AGE code (via actions/checkout@v3)
7. Builds AGE with `make PG_CONFIG=$HOME/pg18/bin/pg_config install`
8. Builds pgvector from source
9. Runs regression tests with `make PG_CONFIG=$HOME/pg18/bin/pg_config installcheck EXTRA_TESTS="pgvector fuzzystrmatch pg_trgm"`

Key things to note:
- The workflow uses actions/cache for PostgreSQL, but in a Docker container we can't really use that - we'll need to rebuild each time or use a volume mount. For simplicity, I'll just rebuild from scratch in the container.
- The workflow uses `sudo apt-get`, but in a Docker container running as root, we don't need sudo.
- It uses `$HOME` which should be `/root` in our case.
- The regression tests location is hardcoded to `$HOME/work/age/age/regress/regression.diffs`

FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    build-essential \
    libreadline-dev \
    zlib1g-dev \
    flex \
    bison \
    git \
    perl \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

COPY repo/ /app/

RUN git clone --depth 1 --branch REL_18_STABLE https://git.postgresql.org/git/postgresql.git /tmp/pg18source && \
    cd /tmp/pg18source && \
    ./configure --prefix=/usr/local/pg18 CFLAGS="-std=gnu99 -ggdb -O0" --enable-cassert && \
    make install -j$(nproc) > /dev/null && \
    cd contrib && \
    cd fuzzystrmatch && \
    make PG_CONFIG=/usr/local/pg18/bin/pg_config install -j$(nproc) > /dev/null && \
    cd ../pg_trgm && \
    make PG_CONFIG=/usr/local/pg18/bin/pg_config install -j$(nproc) > /dev/null

ENV PATH="/usr/local/pg18/bin:${PATH}"
ENV PG_CONFIG=/usr/local/pg18/bin/pg_config

RUN make PG_CONFIG=/usr/local/pg18/bin/pg_config install -j$(nproc)

RUN git clone https://github.com/pgvector/pgvector.git /tmp/pgvector && \
    cd /tmp/pgvector && \
    make PG_CONFIG=/usr/local/pg18/bin/pg_config install -j$(nproc) > /dev/null

COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -e

cd /app

export PG_CONFIG=/usr/local/pg18/bin/pg_config
export PATH="/usr/local/pg18/bin:${PATH}"

echo "Running AGE regression tests..."

  echo "Dump section begin."
  if [ -f /app/regress/regression.diffs ]; then

  echo "Dump section end."

if [ -z "$FAILED" ]; then
  echo "FINAL_STATUS = SUCCESS"
  exit 0
else
  echo "FINAL_STATUS = FAIL"
  exit 1
fi

FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    build-essential \
    libreadline-dev \
    zlib1g-dev \
    flex \
    bison \
    git \
    perl \
    pkg-config \
    libicu-dev \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

COPY repo/ /app/

RUN git clone --depth 1 --branch REL_18_STABLE https://git.postgresql.org/git/postgresql.git /tmp/pg18source && \
    cd /tmp/pg18source && \
    ./configure --prefix=/usr/local/pg18 CFLAGS="-std=gnu99 -ggdb -O0" --enable-cassert && \
    make install -j$(nproc) > /dev/null && \
    cd contrib && \
    cd fuzzystrmatch && \
    make PG_CONFIG=/usr/local/pg18/bin/pg_config install -j$(nproc) > /dev/null && \
    cd ../pg_trgm && \
    make PG_CONFIG=/usr/local/pg18/bin/pg_config install -j$(nproc) > /dev/null

ENV PATH="/usr/local/pg18/bin:${PATH}"
ENV LD_LIBRARY_PATH="/usr/local/pg18/lib:${LD_LIBRARY_PATH}"
ENV PG_CONFIG=/usr/local/pg18/bin/pg_config

RUN make PG_CONFIG=/usr/local/pg18/bin/pg_config install -j$(nproc)

RUN git clone https://github.com/pgvector/pgvector.git /tmp/pgvector && \
    cd /tmp/pgvector && \
    make PG_CONFIG=/usr/local/pg18/bin/pg_config install -j$(nproc) > /dev/null

COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]
